evals.prompt: Estou no Windows PowerShell dentro de um app Flutter e preciso gerar um AAB assinado para subir na Play Store. Ainda nao tenho keystore. Me passe o passo a passo seguro.
evals.expected_output: Uses Windows PowerShell commands, includes keytool with $env:USERPROFILE and backtick continuations, key.properties with escaped Windows path guidance, Gradle signing config warning, flutter build appbundle, and secret-safety reminders.

evals.prompt: Meu projeto Flutter usa android/app/build.gradle.kts e eu preciso configurar signingConfig release sem misturar Groovy. O que devo alterar?
evals.expected_output: Identifies Kotlin DSL, gives build.gradle.kts-specific Properties/FileInputStream and signingConfigs create("release") guidance, warns not to use Groovy syntax, and suggests flutter clean after Gradle changes.

evals.prompt: Quero mandar um APK fora da Play Store para QA. Qual comando de release devo usar e onde fica o arquivo?
evals.expected_output: Explains APK vs AAB, recommends flutter build apk --split-per-abi for smaller APKs unless fat APK is intentional, reports build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/, and mentions flutter install for connected devices.
